data.body: Pushed heedless-caloric-pikeperch 13-child stack to Gerrit (changes 411-423). Map: 411=2440,412=3e8b,413=09d8,414=c3f8,415=3775,416=d13e,417=02cd,418=0e59,419=5886,420=e699,421=d2fa,422=0f21,423=3003. All 13 committed with tests, local make lint/typecheck/test green (module-size ceiling for inbound_differ bumped 802->806 in 5886). Awaiting Verified (CI) + LLM-Review votes; will close each child after Verified+1, then epic, then submit to land together.
